claim_text: Scaling employee-generated content on LinkedIn requires selecting credible employees, capturing expertise, creating profile-native posts, reviewing lightly, publishing from relevant profiles, and measuring buyer response.
notes: Article POV grounded in internal operating model.

claim_text: LinkedIn's 2026 guidance recommends using sales conversations, customer success conversations, support tickets, and win/loss notes, and starting with employees who have hands-on experience.
draft_location: Scaling EGC Is A System Design Problem
notes: Do not cite Semrush-specific AI-search statistics in this post.

claim_text: Sales, customer success, support, and win/loss inputs contain buyer phrasing that can inform LinkedIn content ideas.
draft_location: Capture Expertise In A Weekly Input Loop
notes: Use as content-input support, not as a performance promise.

claim_text: FTC guidance says employees who mention an employer's products on social media should disclose the relationship, and listing the employer on the profile page is not enough.
notes: Applies when employees endorse or promote company products.

claim_text: LinkedIn Professional Community Policies require real, authentic information, prohibit false or misleading content, and warn against coordinated artificial engagement.
LinkedIn Help says Page admins can reshare employees' best mentions and posts and notify employees about important Page posts.
draft_location: Distribute Through The Right Team Members
notes: Current feature context after advocacy surfaces were discontinued.

claim_text: LinkedIn Employee Notifications can be used once per day, employees can opt out, and notified employees can react, comment, or reshare.
draft_location: Distribute Through The Right Team Members
notes: Used to recommend sparing use of notifications.

claim_text: The 2025 Edelman-LinkedIn hidden-buyer research says 56% of target buyers and 55% of hidden buyers use thought leadership as part of vendor evaluation.
draft_location: Measure Buyer Response, Not Just Reach
notes: Supports buyer-signal measurement beyond visible engagement.
